metadata.description: GodoMaster — Godot 4.x game development intelligence with GDScript patterns, node architecture, 2D/3D workflows, physics, animation, UI, audio, shaders, networking, and performance optimization.

plugins.name: godomaster
plugins.description: Complete Godot 4.x game development skill — GDScript, scene architecture, 2D/3D rendering, physics, animation, UI design, audio systems, input handling, shaders, networking, performance optimization, export pipelines, and file I/O. Based on official Godot documentation.
